hero.desc: I'm Unai. Full Stack Developer based in Bilbao. This is where I document the projects I build and what I learn along the way.

about.title: About me
about.note: Bilbao → production, via Spring Boot and React.
about.quote: I build software thinking about the people who'll actually use it: if it doesn't hold up in production, with real data and real load, it doesn't matter how good the demo looked.
about.bio1: Full Stack Developer with 1.5 years of experience, graduated in Computer Engineering from UPV/EHU. During my degree I took part in Formula Student Bizkaia, working on the autonomous driving system. I'm passionate about building complete products that actually work, not just pretty demos.
about.bio2: I work across the full product cycle: data model and API in Spring Boot, auth, deployment, CI/CD, and the React interface. This portfolio collects the projects I build on my own and the things I learn along the way.
